nasb.text: Abram settled in the land of Canaan, while Lot settled in the cities of the valley, and moved his tents as far as Sodom.

esv.text: Abram settled in the land of Canaan, while Lot settled among the cities of the valley and moved his tent as far as Sodom.

cnv.text: 亞伯蘭住在迦南地；羅得住在平原的城市中，漸漸挪移帳棚，直到所多瑪。

ccb.text: 亚伯兰住在迦南，罗得则住在平原的城邑里，并渐渐把帐篷迁移到所多玛附近。

csbs.text: 亚伯兰住在迦南地，而罗得住在平原的城镇中，渐渐迁移帐篷，直到所多玛。
